name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my injury—did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my injury—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: Not necessarily, but be cautious—adjusters aim to minimize payouts; statements can be used against you.[1] No legal duty to give recorded ones.[2] Key factors: Stick to facts, don't admit fault or exaggerate; no-fault but details matter. Practical guidance: Politely end call, consult lawyer before more talks; review any signed forms. Many regret unsupervised chats.
